历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 6657th in 2023 → approximately 7365th in 2024 (shifted back by about 708 places) → approximately 7027th in 2025 (shifted forward by about 338 places). Over the past 3 years, the overall range fluctuated between 6600-7400 places, with a baseline of about 7027th in 2025. Science enrollment plan: 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 3 in 2026, a 25% reduction compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment quotas theoretically lowers competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 92nd in 2026, with slight fluctuations between 86-92 in recent years, overall stable; 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (a professor in the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, sparking public controversy), which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 100th, rated as 'average', low attention on short video platforms; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Language and Literature (A-) achieved A- or above, with a limited number of advantageous disciplines, offering limited appeal to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science enrollment majors include Clinical Medicine (socially popular/hot), Biological Science (teacher training/education differentiation wait-and-see), Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (chemical engineering clearly discouraged); total number of Gaokao candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from about 77,000 in 2025 (science + arts combined), sharply intensifying competition; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan Province, far from Xinjiang, and cross-province study preferences may somewhat suppress Xinjiang candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7027th, the 25% reduction in science enrollment in 2026 (ranking number decreases), the substantial increase in total Xinjiang candidates (ranking number increases), and the somewhat negative reputation, the reduction effect and the surge in candidates offset each other, but the scale of candidate growth far exceeds the reduction proportion, making intensified competition the dominant force; predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 6173rd, with a range of 5673-6673rd.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Biological Science (Teacher Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Hunan Normal University only admits 2 majors in Xinjiang science. If your ranking is within the predicted range (5673-6673), it is recommended to aim for Clinical Medicine as a stretch goal and Biological Science (Teacher Training) as a safe choice; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on Clinical Medicine as a key target.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 1396th in 2023 → approximately 1482nd in 2024 (shifted back by about 86 places), with the 2024 rank of 1482 as the recent baseline; the liberal arts enrollment plan was 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024 (referencing recent years, all 4), and 2 in 2026, a 50% reduction compared to recent levels, theoretically reducing competition intensity due to the halved enrollment quota.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 92nd on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, with stable rankings between 86th and 92nd in recent years; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (incidents regarding teacher ethics and conduct), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity is average (overall rank 100), with low attention; Foreign Language and Literature (A-) is the only A- or above discipline, which does not directly correspond to the liberal arts enrollment majors (Ideological and Political Education, History Education, Tourism Management, etc.), so the disciplinary advantage has limited appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The liberal arts enrollment majors include Ideological and Political Education (corresponding to Marxist Theory, for which Hunan Normal University has not received an A- rating), History Education (corresponding to Chinese History/World History, unrated), and Tourism Management (corresponding to Business Administration, with a clearly discouraging social popularity); the total number of Gaokao candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from the combined total of about 77,000 liberal arts and science candidates in 2025, leading to markedly intensified competition; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, far from Xinjiang, and the regional preference for cross-province study may have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Xinjiang liberal arts candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2024 baseline rank of 1482, the 50% reduction in liberal arts enrollment in 2026 (direction of decreasing rank number), the substantial increase in the total number of Xinjiang candidates (direction of increasing rank number), and the somewhat negative reputation, the reduction effect and the surge in candidates offset each other, but the scale of candidate growth far exceeds the reduction proportion, making intensified competition the dominant force; the predicted minimum rank for 2026 is approximately 1087, with a range of 887-1287.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Ideological and Political Education (Teacher Training)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Hunan Normal University has few liberal arts enrollment majors in Xinjiang. For ranks within the predicted range (887-1287), it is recommended to aim for Ideological and Political Education as a sprint target, History Education as a safe choice, and Tourism Management as a fallback; for ranks significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Ideological and Political Education.
